SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made as of October 25, 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Alex Tan ("Seller"), NRIC: S8765432B, residing at 123 Fictional Road, Singapore 789012, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 or email: alex.tan@fictionalmail.sg.

2. FutureTech Pte. Ltd. ("Buyer"), a company incorporated in Singapore with Unique Entity Number (UEN) 200312345G, having its registered office at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 123456.

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell and the Buyer agrees to purchase 100,000 shares of TechVision Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000 under the terms of this SPA.

The parties acknowledge that the project plan for the integration of these shares into the Buyer's portfolio is not included in the current project status.

For identification verification, please refer to https://example.sg/user/S8 7 6 5 4 3 2 B.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this SPA as of the date first above written.
